mapper.select: SELECT fuel_type FROM vehicle_type WHERE vehicle_id = #{_parameter} ORDER BY fuel_type
SELECT video_id, vehicle_id, display_order, url, channel_name, title FROM video WHERE vehicle_id = #{_parameter} ORDER BY display_order, video_id

SELECT ve.vehicle_id, ve.vehicle_name, ve.vehicle_name_ko, ve.category, ve.segment, ve.body_type, ve.seating, ve.min_price, ve.max_price, ve.description, ve.summary, ve.brand_id, ve.brand_name, ve.brand_name_ko, vd.url, vd.channel_name, vd.title FROM vehicle ve LEFT JOIN video vd ON ve.vehicle_id = vd.vehicle_id AND vd.display_order = 1 WHERE ve.vehicle_id = #{vehicleId}
